title: Devconnect 2025: The Official Recap by ECH Institute | Key Moments & Community Highlights
description:
🇦🇷 Experience the Energy of Devconnect 2025 with ECH Institute!

A quick recap from the ECH Institute capturing the vibrant energy of Buenos Aires - from deep technical talks and hands-on workshops to insightful interviews and community moments. A memorable journey of Devconnect 2025, reliving the highlights that brought the ecosystem together.
